testsuite.name: Create, Edit, Search and Delete User

testcase.name: I navigate to OrangeHRM login page
testcase.classname: Create, Edit, Search and Delete User

testcase.name: I login with valid credentials
testcase.classname: Create, Edit, Search and Delete User

testcase.name: I navigate to Admin menu
testcase.classname: Create, Edit, Search and Delete User

testcase.name: I create a new user with details
testcase.classname: Create, Edit, Search and Delete User

testcase.name: I should see the user created successfully
testcase.classname: Create, Edit, Search and Delete User

testcase.name: I search the created user "testuser8"
testcase.classname: Create, Edit, Search and Delete User

testcase.name: I edit the user details
testcase.classname: Create, Edit, Search and Delete User

testcase.name: I verify the user is updated
testcase.classname: Create, Edit, Search and Delete User

testcase.name: I delete the user "testuser8_updated"
testcase.classname: Create, Edit, Search and Delete User

testcase.name: I verify the user is deleted
testcase.classname: Create, Edit, Search and Delete User
